{{Infobox artifact
| name = First Journal of Estyr Six
| introduced = Of Killers and Kings
}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|The [[First Journal of Estyr Six]] contains the quote 'Peace is always temporary. But then again, so is [[life]].'}}

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:Of Killers and Kings]]
